items.item: system_context_summary ingested from Module 1
items.note: Module 1's system_scope_summary.json (v1, compatible with system_context_summary.v1) used directly; no duplicate created.

items.item: Every UCBD metadata consistent with M1 project_metadata
Every UCBD swimlane actor appears in M1 external_actors
No new actors introduced in Module 2
Every selected UC has a .ucbd.json
items.note: 6 UCBDs: UC01, UC03, UC04, UC06, UC08, UC11

items.item: Every UCBD has exactly one 'The System' column
Every UCBD populates initial_conditions, ending_conditions, actor_steps_table, notes
Every step row has exactly one populated actor cell
Every system step starts with 'The system shall'
Every UCBD has at least one note
items.note: Notes range from 7–9 items per UCBD

items.item: Every row has index + requirement + abstract_function_name
Every index is unique and follows UC<xx>.R<yy> or CC.R<yy>
No retired indexes reused
Every requirement starts with 'The system shall'
Every requirement is atomic (no and/or joining behaviors)
No vague qualifiers (fast, easy, intuitive, appropriate)
No subjective language (user-friendly, seamless, elegant)
Every requirement is verifiable (pass/fail test implied)
Every requirement is functional (no structural choices)
items.note: M1 hard constraints carried as constraints, not as structural baked-in choices.

items.item: Every abstract function is snake_case verb-object
No inline numeric thresholds — every threshold is a named constant
Cross-cutting concerns captured as CC.R entries
Every placeholder in requirements has a constant
Every constant has name, value, units, estimate/final, source, owner
Every unit is specified (no blanks)
estimate_final ∈ {Estimate, Final}
Every Final has a final_date
items.note: Only TRACEBACK_COVERAGE_PCT is Final (M1 hard constraint); final_date = 2026-04-20

items.item: No orphans (defined but unreferenced)
No conflicts (two names for same concept)
Every UCBD has a corresponding .activity.mmd
Every system action has a <<requirement>> link
Every .mmd is valid Mermaid syntax
items.note: Validated manually — flowchart TB + subgraph + dashed links + requirement parallelograms

items.item: Every requirement appears in ≥1 activity diagram OR is tagged CC.R<yy>
No needs_user_input=true flags blocking final review
items.note: 25 constants flagged needs_user_input=true are auto-filled with Estimate + surfaced in open_questions.json per schema-first policy. Every one carries math trace + top-3 alternatives. These tighten to Final in Module 4 Decision Matrix, not now.

items.item: No TODO/TBD placeholders in any requirement or constant
Delving report present with new_requirements count reconciled
items.note: 10 cross-cutting requirements added during delve; see requirements_table.json#delving_report

items.item: Cross-references are bidirectional

module_1_upstream_refs.note: M1 system_scope_summary.json is treated as M2's system_context_summary (schema-compatible per M1's _compatible_with declaration). No duplicate file was created.

open_items_deferred.compliance_scope_narrowing: Module 4 Decision Matrix (AUDIT_RETENTION_DAYS, EVIDENCE_EXPORT_FORMATS may tighten)
open_items_deferred.pptx_generation: Run generate_ucbd_pptx.py after this review — see pptx_deck path above
